ae21b27d5.title: Can Editing 1 Neuron Fix Repetition Loops in LLMs?
ae21b27d5.body:
arXiv:2606.13705v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Yes. Can it cure doom loops? Probably not. The Gemma 4 instruction-tuned models share a reproducible failure: on long factual enumeration prompts, such as listing every episode of a TV series, the 88 IAU constellations, or the 151 original Pokemon, they collapse into repetition, either a tight verbatim loop or a list whose entries decay onto a single

a5341be25.title: The Weight Norm Sets the Grokking Timescale: A Causal Delay Law
a5341be25.body:

We settle this by intervening on the norm during training rather than only o

点击下方「查看原文」阅读完整内容。
